aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with clear service offerings and contact information but lacks content depth, reviews, and keyword optimization.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews to build trust and improve local SEO.
Incorporate location-based keywords throughout the website to target local search queries.
Create a blog section to provide informative content related to HVAC services.

gbp_analysis.summary: The website includes essential GBP elements such as service details and contact information but lacks detailed business information and customer engagement features.
critical_issues: No Google reviews or ratings are present.
Missing detailed business description and service area information.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across the website and potentially other platforms, which can confuse search engines and customers.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across the website and all online directories.
Claim and verify the Google Business Profile to manage citations effectively.
Use a citation audit tool to identify and correct inconsistencies.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement signals
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local searchers and potential customers seeking trustworthy HVAC services
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and adding schema markup for reviews
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content that establishes the business as an expert in the HVAC industry

page_title: HVAC Installation in Denver - CABRAL HEATING AND AIR
